properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: O Your name, is my first defense And O Your name is my last amen It carries me when I cannot stand It reaches me when I reach the end

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus Your name, when the whole world shakes Jesus Your name, I will ever praise My battle cry every night and day I’ll sing Your name over everything I’ll sing Your name over everything

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: O Your name is my greatest strength It fights for me and it won’t relent I cast my cares Every burden fall For there’s one name that can bear them all

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In every storm, You’re the Prince of Peace The Lord of all, You are heaven’s King I’ll sing Your name til my last breath here Then I’ll sing again, with my first breath there
